writeup: The Buffalo Bills are generating offseason buzz as analysts and reporters examine which players could be on the move before the 2026 season kicks off. Trade speculation is a common fixture of the NFL offseason, and Buffalo is no exception as the front office weighs roster construction decisions. With the regular season still months away, fans and insiders alike are keeping a close eye on any moves that could reshape the team's depth chart. The Bills organization continues to balance win-now ambitions with long-term roster flexibility.

articles.title: Bills Players Who Could Be Traded Before the 2026 Season
